ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the media file on the server */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata associated with the media file in JSON format */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail of the media file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the media file in seconds */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the media file in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the media file in pixels */,
  "bitrate" REAL /* Bitrate of the media file in kbps */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second of the media file */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the media file in Hz */,
  "channels" INTEGER /* Number of audio channels in the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., 3FR, AAX) */,
  "support" TEXT /* Support level (e.g., Read, Write, Read/Write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the file type */,
  "extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .3fr, .aax) */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type (e.g., image/x-3fr, audio/aax) */,
  "container_format" TEXT /* Container format (e.g., TIFF, QuickTime) */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used in the file type (e.g., Hasselblad, H.264) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata format */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file type it belongs to */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata format (e.g., EXIF, IPTC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata format */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the metadata format */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the metadata format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_formats_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the accessing browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_conversion_logs" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being converted */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion event */,
  "source_format" TEXT /* Original format of the file */,
  "target_format" TEXT /* Target format after conversion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the conversion failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_conversion_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent folder (if any) */,
  "folder_type" TEXT /* Type of folder (e.g., root, subfolder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_folder_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_folder_association_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_folder_association_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_quality_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score representing the quality of the media file */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the assessor */,
  "assessed_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_quality_assessment_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_quality_assessment_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., upload, conversion, assessment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., upload, delete, edit) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
